response.global_analysis: 1. Segment 1 Match: The initial segment ('Star-mine') has no provided lyrics reference. The vocals were transcribed manually with 100% precision. 2. subtitles.original: シンコペーションで進む
subtitles.english: We move forward with syncopation,

subtitles.original: もっともっともっとペースを上げて
subtitles.english: faster, faster, faster, picking up the pace!

subtitles.original: ペダルを回して 狂うほど回って 飛んでく これじゃ終わらない
subtitles.english: Spin the pedals, spin crazily, fly away—it won't end here!

subtitles.original: 迷ったら踊れ 自堕落なステップでいいさ
subtitles.english: If you get lost, dance! Depraved steps are just fine,

subtitles.original: お構いなしの稲妻になって
subtitles.english: becoming a careless bolt of lightning!

subtitles.original: 声を枯らせ 泥だらけになってもいい 生きていたい
subtitles.english: Scream until your voice is hoarse! Even if we get covered in mud, I want to live!

subtitles.original: 今夜 あの空で合流して
subtitles.english: Let's meet up in that sky tonight,

subtitles.original: 朝が満ちるまで
subtitles.english: until the morning is full!

subtitles.original: それぞれの星を探そう
subtitles.english: Let's look for our own stars!

subtitles.original: ねえ 今 同じこと思っていたんだって ほら
subtitles.english: Hey, you know, we were just thinking the exact same thing! Look!

subtitles.original: 話さなくても分かり合えた
subtitles.english: We understood each other without even speaking.

subtitles.original: こんな嬉しさをずっと歌ってみたかった
subtitles.english: I've always wanted to sing this kind of happiness.

subtitles.original: 光っていた未来が ずっと待っていた世界が
subtitles.english: The glowing future, the world we've been waiting for,

subtitles.original: きらめいて目の前にあるから<
subtitles.english: because it's glittering right in front of our eyes.

subtitles.original: また瞬きの刹那まで このストーリーの最後まで
subtitles.english: Until the blink of an eye, until the very end of this story,

subtitles.original: 輝く花でいたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to be a blooming flower!

subtitles.original: 不完全な私達が 一瞬の欠片達が
subtitles.english: We, who are imperfect, the fragments of a single moment,

subtitles.original: 重なって今スターマインを奏でてゆくよ
subtitles.english: overlapping to play a starmine now!

subtitles.original: それは夢見るだけじゃ叶わない思いをずっと
subtitles.english: Those feelings that won't come true just by dreaming, forever...

subtitles.original: 新しくしてゆく ずっと追いかけてゆこう
subtitles.english: Renewing them, let's chase them forever!

subtitles.original: 風を仰いで
subtitles.english: Basking in the wind,

subtitles.original: 雨を抜けて
subtitles.english: passing through the rain,

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ
subtitles.english: bloom in full glory,

subtitles.original: 何千の空へ
subtitles.english: into thousands of skies!

subtitles.original: ノンブレス・オブリージュ
subtitles.english: [Song: Non-breath oblige]

subtitles.original: 世界中のすべての人間に好かれるなんて気持ち悪いよ
subtitles.english: It's creepy to be liked by everyone in this world.

subtitles.original: だけど一つになれない教室で 君と二人 手を繋いでいたいの
subtitles.english: But I want to hold hands with you in a classroom where we can't connect.

subtitles.original: 数の暴力に白旗をあげて
subtitles.english: I'll raise the white flag to the tyranny of the majority,

subtitles.original: 悪感情を殺してハイチーズ
subtitles.english: suppress my ill feelings, and say cheese.

subtitles.original: ポストトゥルースの甘いディープキス
subtitles.english: A sweet, post-truth French kiss,

subtitles.original: エロく歪んでるラブアンドピース
subtitles.english: a warped, erotic love & peace.

subtitles.original: 自己中の光線銃 乱射する
subtitles.english: A self-centered ray gun, firing wildly,

subtitles.original: 強者のナンセンス
subtitles.english: the nonsense of the strong.

subtitles.original: オートクチュールで作る
subtitles.english: An haute couture

subtitles.original: 殺しのライセンス
subtitles.english: license to kill.

subtitles.original: 分断を生んじゃった椅子取りゲーム
subtitles.english: A game of musical chairs that created division,

subtitles.original: 無痛分娩で授かるベイブ
subtitles.english: a baby that is given birth by epidural labor.

subtitles.original: 壮大な内輪ノリを歴史と呼ぶ
subtitles.english: We're calling a grandiose in-joke "history."

subtitles.original: 生きたいが死ねと言われ
subtitles.english: I want to live but I'm told to die,

subtitles.original: 死にたいが生きろと言われ
subtitles.english: I want to die but I'm told to live.

subtitles.original: 生きたいが死ねと言われ
subtitles.english: I want to live but I'm told to die,

subtitles.original: 死にたいが生きろと言われ
subtitles.english: I want to die but I'm told to live.

subtitles.original: 幸せ自慢はダメ？
subtitles.english: Is it wrong to boast of my happiness?

subtitles.original: 不幸嘆いてもダメ？
subtitles.english: Is it wrong to grieve over my unhappiness?

subtitles.original: 図々しい言葉を避け
subtitles.english: I'm avoiding impudent words

subtitles.original: 明るい未来のため
subtitles.english: for our glorious future.

subtitles.original: さんはい
subtitles.english: One, two.

subtitles.original: 「この世には息もできない人が沢山いるんですよ」
subtitles.english: "There are many people in this world who can't even breathe."

subtitles.english: One, two.

subtitles.original: 「この世には息もできない人が沢山いるんですよ」
subtitles.english: "There are many people in this world who can't even breathe."

subtitles.original: あちらが立てば こちらが立たず
subtitles.english: If I'm true to one side, I'm false to the other;

subtitles.original: 譲り 奪い 守り 行き違い
subtitles.english: we give, we take, we protect, we misunderstand.

subtitles.original: 地雷原で立ち止まり
subtitles.english: I stop in the minefield,

subtitles.original: 大人しく犬になるんだわ
subtitles.english: and obediently become a dog, woof.

subtitles.english: Non-breath, non-breath, non-breath, non-breath oblige.

subtitles.original: I love you
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: 息苦しい日々の水面下
subtitles.english: Under the surface of my suffocating days,

subtitles.original: ゆらゆらと煙る血の花
subtitles.english: a flower of blood smokes and flickers.

subtitles.original: コンプレックスを武器に争う
subtitles.english: We use our complexes as weapons to fight

subtitles.original: それぞれの都合と自由のため
subtitles.english: for the sake of our convenience and freedom.

subtitles.original: 息を止めることを強制する
subtitles.english: We obligate ourselves to hold our breath.

subtitles.original: 息が詰まる...
subtitles.english: I can't breathe...

subtitles.english: Saying it's self-defense, wielding a chainsaw,

subtitles.original: まともな人たちが怖いよ<
subtitles.english: I'm afraid of decent people.

subtitles.original: 愛燦々 春爛漫
subtitles.english: Brilliant love, brilliant spring,

subtitles.original: 日々だんだん大事なものが消えていくよ
subtitles.english: important things are slowly disappearing each and every day.

subtitles.english: my ugly emotions burst out

subtitles.original: 真っ白な鳥になるんだな
subtitles.english: and become a snow-white bird.
